case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. BRENDA CHRISTINE BEECK

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINITFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO BRENDA CHRISTINE BEECK- OF SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER - - RETURN TO SENDER-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-03-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE AT TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH SPOHN--CCSF--INVESTIGATOR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BEECK, BRENDA CHRISTINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $150.00) SERVED OCT-14-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEECK, BRENDA CHRISTINE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BEECK, BRENDA CHRISTINE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEECK, BRENDA CHRISTINE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
